evals.prompt: Build me the Sleep Logging screen for Caca Traca as a React Native component. The user should be able to log when they went to bed, when they woke up, and rate their sleep quality. Include any relevant symptoms like night sweats or waking frequently.
evals.expected_output: A React Native component that follows the design language: uses violet/wellness domain color, progressive disclosure (quick log path + optional details), chip-based quality rating, consistent card styling, proper token usage, 44px touch targets, bottom drawer pattern

evals.prompt: I need to build the Trends/Reports screen for Caca Traca. It should show bowel movement patterns over the past week, food tolerance summary, and any emerging correlations. Make it a React Native screen component.
evals.expected_output: A screen using the correct domain colors for each data type (teal for BMs, sky for food, emerald for activity), Health Overview card pattern, chart placeholders with proper empty states, problem/safe foods tabbed analysis, tracking consistency streak, proper information density (not too sparse, not overwhelming)

evals.prompt: Create the Water Tracking bottom drawer component for Caca Traca in React Native. Users need to quickly log water intake throughout the day.
evals.expected_output: A bottom drawer with visual fill metaphor (bottle/glass), quick-add buttons (+250mL, +500mL), goal setting, intake log below, sky/food domain color, fast path under 10 seconds, unit toggle option, proper drawer structure with drag handle and close button
